author: Dr15Jones
body:
#### PR description:

The setIntervalFor and the calls to the various produce methods no longer have to be done in strict sequence.

The support for non-concurrent EventSetup Record Finders is being removed from CMSSW. This was the last one remaining.
#### PR validation:

Code compiles, related unit tests in Validation/CTPPS pass.

resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2296
title: Made CTPPSCompositeESSource a concurrent Finder
